series_metadata.series_description: Records document the preparation of the office''s budget request to the Office of Budget Management (OBM) as well as the planned distribution of funds to the the office''s sections. Records include, but are not limited to: documents pertaining to the agency budget; budget narratives; expenditure justifications; executive budget proposals; spending authority adjustments; OBM reports that reference appropriations; internal budget plans and projections; reports and supporting budget documentation and tables; documents that support the development of each biennium/annual budget; divisional budget analysis; and other materials relating to specific budget issues during the biennium.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: from start of fiscal year ; Paper: from start of fiscal year
